title: CBB Directives on Outsourcing Services Containing Customer Information
summary: Prohibited retail banks and financing companies from outsourcing services containing private customer information to non-licensee service providers or service providers operating outside Bahrain, based on the CBB annual report description.

theme_notes.data_privacy.crossborder_data_flows: Restricted offshore outsourcing of customer information by retail banks and financing companies.

notes: Related instruments: Later reflected or replaced by CBB OM-2 and cloud outsourcing rules
